utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look at it ! Ohhh ! Wallpaper a little faded , that is okay . Carpet a little loose . Hardwood floors ! !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hello .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh ! Ooh ! Oh Monica ! It is so beautiful .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know ! ! !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So , I am here , ready to play .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I brought a bunch of stuff for the house , so check it out . Ha ... ha .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I brought a bunch of stuff for the house

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What this ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That is a dog , every house should have a dog .

emotion_cause.span: 10_That is a dog , every house should have a dog .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Not one that can pee on the roof .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , maybe it is so big because the house was built on radioactive waste .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And is this in case the house sneezes ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_is this in case the house sneezes ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , no , that is the ghost for the attic .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not want a ghost .

emotion_cause.span: 14_that is the ghost for the attic .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , nobody wants a ghost . But you have got one , because the house is sitting on an ancient Indian burial ground .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wait a minute , the house was built on radioactive waste , and an ancient Indian burial ground ? That would never happen .

emotion_cause.span: 17_the house was built on radioactive waste , and an ancient Indian burial ground ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , obviously you do not know much about the U . S . government .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: All
utterances.text: Hello .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I need to talk to you !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Sure , what up ?
